title: Lazy-Sunday Russian Raspberry Jam Stir-fry
description: A dense and flavorful fusion of fermented raspberry jam with a touch of smokiness, perfect for lazy Sundays when you want something quick yet satisfying.
instructions: Warm the olive oil in a small pan over low heat.
Add the raspberry jam and mix until well combined, stirring gently to avoid smashing the berries too much.
Stir in smoked paprika powder until evenly distributed and heated through but not burnt.
Serve immediately as a sweet and smoky accompaniment or spread on toast for added flavor.
